sections.heading: High Speed Titanium CNC Milling Services – China OEM CNC Milling Titanium Parts Manufacturer
sections.text: High Speed Titanium CNC Milling Services – China OEM CNC Milling Titanium Parts Manufacturer As a OEM China CNC Milling Company, Junying (CNClathing.com) has become a supplier of titanium CNC milling services, manufacturer and exporter of CNC milling titanium parts and titanium machine shop for more than 10 years. With the advanced CNC milling centers and 5-axis mills, we are capable of machining CNC titanium milled parts for small or large batch production run to exact specification as customer design or drawing, most common file formats are accepted. sections.heading: Properties of Titanium & Titanium Alloy
sections.text: Properties of Titanium & Titanium Alloy Corrosion Resistance to sea water, aqua regia, and chlorine Can be alloyed with iron, aluminium, vanadium, and molybdenum Good ductility, high melting point, low thermal conductivity Hard and refractory Not react with fleshy tissue and bone Very reactive in liquid state Not attacked by mineral acids at room temperature
